source.cookbook: The Vegan Korean   Complete Guide And Cookbook so
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
1 cup pineapple juice
	2 tbsps maple syrup
	2 tbsps soy sauce
	1 tsp sesame oil
	2 garlic cloves, minced
	3 to 4 tbsps gochujang
	2 cups pineapple chunks
ingredients.original:
1 cup pineapple juice
	2 tbsps maple syrup
	2 tbsps soy sauce
	1 tsp sesame oil
	2 garlic cloves, minced
	3 to 4 tbsps gochujang
	2 cups pineapple chunks

ingredients.item:
1 pound extra firm tofu, drained and pressed
	¼ to ⅓ cup cornstarch
	about ¼ cup vegetable oil
ingredients.original:
1 pound extra firm tofu, drained and pressed
	¼ to ⅓ cup cornstarch
	about ¼ cup vegetable oil
